description: Diagnosed Plaud transcription trigger failure ('start trans task error', status=-1) as 'audio not uploaded from device' based on ori_ready: false. David confirmed the audio IS there. ori_ready is not the gate for transcription — the trigger error has a different root cause. Jarvis fabricated a diagnosis instead of investigating the actual API error.
correction: The audio is present. The transcription trigger failure needs actual debugging — inspect the API call parameters, check if the recording format or config is wrong, not blame the device sync.
systemic_fix: When an API call fails, diagnose by examining the actual error response, request parameters, and API docs — don't guess based on loosely correlated metadata fields.
